commit.message:
Fix game hang by correcting CPU branch timing

Branch taken (+1) and page-crossing (+2) cycle penalties were lost because
branch() incremented this.cycles but execute() overwrote it with the base
cost. Use a branchPenalty field that gets added after execute() returns.
Also remove temporary debug instrumentation from PPU and NesEmulator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add component diagram in draw.io format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix game hang after screensaver by delivering APU frame counter IRQs to CPU

The APU's isIrqPending() was never checked in the main loop, so games
relying on APU IRQs for timing (e.g. Double Dragon & Battletoads) would
spin indefinitely waiting for an interrupt that never fired.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add APU implementation for sound support

Implement NES Audio Processing Unit with pulse, triangle, and noise
channels, wired into the CPU bus and main emulation loop. Audio output
uses javax.sound.sampled at 44100 Hz.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix game freeze after title screen by adding NMI edge detection, PRG RAM, and DMA NMI handling

- Trigger NMI immediately when game enables NMI via PPUCTRL while VBlank is active
- Add 8KB PRG RAM at $6000-$7FFF so game state reads/writes work correctly
- Check for NMI during DMA transfer to avoid missing VBlank interrupts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add create task dialog, auto-save, multi-file drop, and comments/data fixes

  of inserting an inline block, supporting #hashtag and @mention parsing

- Change default note sort from sort_order to created_at descending
- Fix GCal calendar fetch deduplication with one-shot ref
- Add is_default field to Contact type, fix Supabase type casts
- Remove note_comments updated_at DB trigger (managed in app code)

- Parse RouterInfo TLVs: SID/Label Range, Local Block, Router Capability, Algorithm
- Implement Extended Prefix Opaque LSA parser (RFC 7684) with Prefix SID Sub-TLV (RFC 8665)

commit.message:
Add per-character reveal animation on hero title, uppercase subheading

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: restore recently played list update when a game is launched (#100)

After the pre/post launch event refactor, `gamesLaunched` was set to
'launching' before the async `safeFetch`/`launchGame` awaits. This caused
Svelte to unmount the play button and set `playButton` to undefined. The
stale `playButton.querySelector('p')!!.textContent = 'PLAYING'` call after
the awaits then threw a TypeError, silently preventing `apps.json` from
being updated and breaking the recently played list ordering.

Fix by removing the now-redundant `playButton` text mutation after launch
(the template and `gamesLaunched` store already handle the 'PLAYING' UI),
and restructuring the pre-launch error catch block to clear `gamesLaunched`
first (restoring the play button to the DOM) before conditionally setting
the error attribute via `tick()`.

https://claude.ai/code/session_017qF5QrZeTYwL4Uem3UjKVV

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(chat): implement axiom-chat Lambda handler and shared DB client — closes #45 (#50)

- backend/src/chat/errors.py: re-exports EngagementNotFoundError from
  turn/state (same class, no duplication) and defines TokenBudgetExceededError
- backend/src/shared/db.py: get_connection() fetches password from
  AWS Secrets Manager (DB_SECRET_ARN) and connection params from env vars
  (DB_HOST, DB_PORT, DB_NAME, DB_USER)
- backend/src/chat/handler.py: thin HTTP adapter over process_turn();
  POST-only, extracts engagement_id from pathParameters, session_id from
  X-Session-Id header (generated if absent); returns 200/400/404/405/429/500;
  500 logs full traceback to CloudWatch but sanitises response body;
  gate_evaluated derived from scope_check == "PASS"

11 new tests covering all HTTP paths, error scenarios, session_id
auto-generation, traceback sanitisation, and Secrets Manager lookup.
128 total tests, 100% coverage, mypy strict clean, ruff clean.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-authored-by: Mike Connors <mtconnors79@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: support --worktrees with MCP tasklist providers (#46)

When a remote MCP provider is configured, ParallelOrchestrator now:
- Fetches tasks from the MCP backend instead of reading local file
- Fetches full task body via get_task() for each worker subprocess
- Skips local tasklist mark-complete in MergePipeline (skip_tasklist_mark=True)
- Marks the remote task done via update_task_status() after successful merge

File-based behavior is completely unchanged.

fix modal-box max-height for PayPal form

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix motion blur broken by integer pixel snapping

round() in _uv_for_t caused all MOTION_BLUR_SAMPLES within a frame
to produce identical offsets, making the blur a no-op. Removing round()
lets sub-frame samples interpolate continuously between the previous
and current integer-pixel positions, restoring effective motion blur
and eliminating the sample-and-hold ripple artifact.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: Local UI as first-class citizen (Phase 1 & 2) (#25)

* feat: decouple server from in-memory session, add --dashboard flag

Phase 1 of #24 (Local UI as first-class citizen):

- Refactor startEditor() -> startServer(): no longer requires a
  ReplaySession to start; all API endpoints are slug-based and
  read from disk
- startDashboard() can now start with zero replays (shows empty state)
- Add -d/--dashboard CLI flag to open Dashboard directly
- Dashboard is now the first choice in session picker (replaces
  hidden 'd' keypress)
- Editor mode always opens with ?session=<slug> in URL
- Viewer falls back to dashboard when no session slug is specified

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add Sessions tab with source discovery and replay generation API

Phase 2 of #24 (Local UI as first-class citizen):

- GET /api/sources: discover AI coding sessions from all providers,
  merge multi-file sessions, mark those with existing replays
- POST /api/generate: parse + transform + save replay from browser,
  includes secret scanning with warnings
- Dashboard now has Sessions | Replays tabs (Sessions is default)
- Session cards show provider badge, timestamp, size, first prompt
- One-click "Generate Replay" with title input, progress, and
  auto-redirect to viewer on success
- Sessions with existing replays show "View Replay" + "Re-generate"
- Manual refresh button for session list
- SourceSession type added to viewer types

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: improve Sessions tab UX — project-first navigation + better identification

- Collapsible project groups with session counts and replay badges
- Projects sorted by most recent activity, top 3 open by default
- Session labels: prefer custom title > git branch > slug
- Git branch shown with branch icon in metadata
- Relative timestamps ("2h ago") for quicker scanning
- Search now also filters by git branch name
- Compact project name display with full path on hover
- Pass gitBranch from providers through to sources API

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: use OS-assigned port to avoid conflicts

Replace fixed port range (3456-3466) with port 0, letting the OS
pick any available port. Dev mode still uses fixed 3456 for Vite
proxy compatibility. Removes the findFreePort helper entirely.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add project sidebar navigation to Sessions tab

Replace collapsible accordion layout with two-pane design:
- Left sidebar with project list (name, count, time, replay count)
- Right panel scoped to selected project with search and actions
- Mobile responsive: sidebar becomes a <select> dropdown
- "All projects" option to show everything

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: smart project path labels in sidebar for disambiguation

Projects with ambiguous names (short, numeric, duplicate like "Code",
"2", "~") now show more path context (e.g., "~/Code" instead of just
"Code"). Full path shown on hover tooltip. Sidebar widened to w-56.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: normalize project paths and dim non-existent projects

Server-side:
- Normalize all project paths to use ~ prefix (no more raw /Users/...)
- Check if each project directory still exists on disk
- Return projectExists flag per session

Client-side:
- Non-existent projects shown at 50% opacity with strikethrough + "gone"
- Increased ambiguity threshold to ≤3 chars for smarter labels
- Improved path shortening for tilde-prefixed paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: forward CLI args in dev script (pnpm dev -- -d now works)

The sh -c script wasn't forwarding positional args to pnpm cli:dev.
Added "$@" forwarding with _ sentinel so flags like -d pass through.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: add dev:dashboard script for HMR dashboard mode

pnpm dev:dashboard — starts Vite (HMR) + CLI in dashboard mode.
Arg forwarding through nested sh -c doesn't work reliably, so use
a dedicated script instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: always show Dashboard option in session picker

Dashboard handles zero-replay state gracefully (Sessions tab works
without any replays), so the option should always be available.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: move Dashboard to bottom of picker, simplify sidebar styling

- Dashboard option moved to bottom of session list (not top)
- Non-existent projects: just dimmed, no strikethrough or "gone" label
- Replay count: "6r" → "6 replays" for clarity

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: Dashboard at top of picker with cursor on first session

Putting Dashboard at the bottom made it invisible due to long
multi-line session names exceeding terminal height. Move it to
the top but set default selection to the first session, so users
press ↑ to reach Dashboard without it blocking the primary flow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Restore the original keypress-based Dashboard access that was
accidentally removed during server refactoring. Press 'd' in the
session picker to open Dashboard — shown in footer help tip as
"↑↓ navigate · ⏎ select · d dashboard". Always available now
(previously gated on hasReplays).

not just ambiguous ones. Long paths truncated with … in the middle.

Sessions panel:

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

[Instrument] Extended analysis — 768-dim verification and chatlog topology

analyze_extended.py runs 4 analyses:

1. SOUL 768-dim nearest-neighbor evolution (UMAP-independent convergence verification)
   - Excludes SOUL.md from corpus search (no circular self-match)
   - v00-v02: analysis (self_assessment_protocol) is nearest
   - v03-v08: essay (the_gate_between_knowing_and_doing) is nearest — hinge registers
   - v09-v16: analysis pulls back as SOUL absorbs more content
   - v17 (crystallized): essay (the_third_point) is nearest again
   - Essay cosine sim: 0.8092 -> 0.8596 (+0.0504 across 18 versions)

2. Wallas rolling window cross-correlation — ALL 9 window/lookahead combos SIGNIFICANT (p=0.0)
   - w20_l5: hit contemplative ratio=0.387, miss=0.168, Cohen's d=1.21
   - w30_l10: hit=0.385, miss=0.024, d=2.12 — largest effect
   - 10/10 peaks above 0.5 contemplative ratio precede synthesis within 10 turns (100%)
   - Wallas intimation stage is a strong, statistically robust predictor

3. Super-cooling threshold
   - Single compression step (v16->v17): 1.54 units vs growth mean 0.56 units
   - Threshold identified: ~7000 words (p=0.062, borderline)
   - Growth 3000-3999 range shows v06->v07 hinge anomaly (1.84 units)

4. Finding 11 — Chatlog domain topology
   - design_note 27.7%, analysis 23.3%, essay 21.3%, journal 11.2%
   - Feb 24 session: essay dominant (44.8%) — hinge day shows in the conversation
   - Feb 25: journal dominant — post-hinge reflective period
   - Late sessions (Mar 4): essay dominant again — late synthesis phase
   - 10.6% of turns in synthesis-proximity

commit.message:
research: add ideal-theoretic CRT and non-coprime PID CRT (chinese-remainder-non-coprime-oq-02) (#3419)

Add 3 new sections (Parts XI-XIII) with 13 fully proved theorems:
- Part XI: Ideal-theoretic CRT for general commutative rings (necessity,
  sufficiency, iff, uniqueness, coprime corollary, three-ideal versions)
- Part XII: Bridge connecting ideal CRT to element-level CRT via principal
  ideals (mem_span_singleton_iff_dvd, element_crt_from_ideal, etc.)
- Part XIII: Non-coprime PID CRT combining ideal and element perspectives

Key result: ∃ x, (x-a)∈I ∧ (x-b)∈J ↔ (a-b)∈I⊔J for arbitrary ideals
in any commutative ring. No coprimality assumption needed.

commit.message:
research: add contraction uniqueness, error bounds, and Sperner's lemma (brouwer-fixed-point-oq-02) (#3421)

New extension file BrouwerFixedPointOQ02Ext.lean with 8 fully proved theorems:
- Contraction fixed point uniqueness (L < 1 → at most one FP)
- A priori error bound: |x - x*| ≤ ε/(1-L) for ε-approximate FPs
- Geometric convergence: |f^n(x₀) - x*| ≤ L^n|x₀ - x*|
- Combined complexity bound: L^n/(1-L) · |f(x₀) - x₀|
- Sperner's Lemma (1D): bichromatic edge in proper 2-coloring
- Discrete IVT (sign-change variant)
- Contraction iterate approximation quality
- Unified complexity summary theorem

0 sorries, 0 axioms. Docker build verified.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Patch virtiofsd vhost crate for VM snapshot restore

virtiofsd v1.13.3 uses vhost crate 0.13.0 which has a bug that causes
cloud-hypervisor --restore to hang for 60s then fail with
VhostUserConnect error. The bug is in update_reply_ack_flag() which
checks self.protocol_features, but that field is only populated when
GET_PROTOCOL_FEATURES is called — which cloud-hypervisor skips during
restore (features remembered from snapshot).

Fix: NixOS overlay that patches the vendored vhost crate source to
remove the protocol_features check, matching the fix in
rust-vmm/vhost#290 (merged in vhost 0.14.0, not yet in virtiofsd).

Ref: cloud-hypervisor/cloud-hypervisor#6931

- Fix deposit fields to subtract from total and add Balance Due line
- Refactor ContractWizard into step components with progress indicator
- Add batch contract ingestion with Gemini AI scanning
- Admin panel: user suspend/delete, notes threads, email logs
- Security hardening: move Gemini to backend, auth improvements
- Prisma migrations for email log, pending contract type, admin notes
- PDF reference number uses creation date and 5-digit format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: address-level search (e.g. "4523 Saint-Denis")

API:
- Parse address numbers from query (leading or trailing)
- Find matching segment where debut_adresse <= N <= fin_adresse
- Return matched_segment info with status, side, towing

Search results:
- Show address number prefix when detected
- Show matched segment side (côté gauche/droite)
- Status badge reflects the specific segment, not the whole street

Street detail:
- Accept ?address= query param
- Blue banner showing exact address status
- Map centers and zooms on matched segment
- Matched row highlighted in segment table with "← votre adresse"
- Page title includes address number for SEO

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: alerte-deneigement
repository.description: Alertes deneigement gratuites pour Montreal - App mobile + Web + API

commit.message:
Add Phase 7 & 8 hands-on labs: operations and advanced topics

Phase 7 (Infrastructure & Operations):
- Backup/restore with SQL-native BACKUP/RESTORE commands
- TTL management with lazy merge-time evaluation
- Disk & part management (system.parts, compression ratios)
- Too-many-parts simulation and batch INSERT fix
- Mutations (ALTER UPDATE/DELETE) vs lightweight DELETE
- Monitoring dashboard via system.metrics/events/async_metrics
- Added backups.xml config and mounted on all 4 CH nodes

Phase 8 (Advanced Topics):
- Projections deep dive: multiple projections, storage cost analysis
- Lightweight deletes vs mutations: timing comparison, row masking
- Window functions: running totals, lagInFrame, rankings, sessions
- Dictionaries: COMPLEX_KEY_HASHED, RANGE_HASHED, dictGet enrichment
- Parameterized views: typed reusable query templates
- Buffer tables + async inserts: high-frequency ingestion patterns

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: clickhouse-cluster-lab
repository.description: Production-like ClickHouse cluster (2 shards × 2 replicas + 3 Keeper nodes) via Docker Compose, with deep-dive learning notes

commit.message:
Add multi-baby profiles, insights tab, measurements, themes, and reset

- Multi-baby onboarding: add multiple babies during setup
- Baby profile switcher: switch active baby from settings
- Per-baby theme selection with 5 new themes (dark, midnight, ocean, lavender, monochrome)
- Insights tab: bar charts for feedings, diapers, sleep across day/week
- Measurements screen: record weight, height, head circumference with line chart
- Activity counts on Log screen badges
- Reset App option in Settings with destructive confirmation
- Growth records repository for measurement persistence
- Dynamic status bar (light/dark) based on active theme
- Version bump to 1.1.0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: mount /home/psychopathy and /root as dual repo volumes

Repos are split across two parent dirs on the server; mount both
instead of a single configurable REPOS_BASE.
